description: Fix issues from v1 review: LLM aggression key, streaming display, post-processing UX, non-determinism, lexical regex hazard, AI risk disclaimer, API key from env, error recovery.
steps: Add llm_aggression key to each intensity profile in config.py and use it in pipeline.py
Redesign process_stream to not yield Pass 1 chunks - run Pass 1 internally, yield only Pass 2
Fix post-processing silent replacement - run post-processing internally, yield final text cleanly
Add seed parameter to pipeline and all NLP stages for reproducibility
Fix lexical regex mutation - collect replacements first, apply in reverse order
Add AI risk score disclaimer in app.py
Add os.environ.get for API key in config.py, update README.md
Add error recovery in LLM streaming - fallback to Pass 1 or pre-LLM text on failure
acceptance_criteria: LLM stage uses dedicated llm_aggression config key
Streaming only shows Pass 2 output to user (Pass 1 runs internally)
Post-processing result is yielded cleanly without sentinel-based swap
Pipeline accepts seed parameter and passes to NLP stages
Lexical replacement handles multiple occurrences without position corruption
AI risk metric has disclaimer text
API key reads from THESIS_FORGE_API_KEY environment variable with fallback
LLM errors are caught with graceful fallback to previous stage output
verification: python -c "from humanizer.config import API_KEY; import os; os.environ['THESIS_FORGE_API_KEY']='test123'; from importlib import reload; import humanizer.config; reload(humanizer.config); assert humanizer.config.API_KEY == 'test123'; print('ENV OK')"
timeout 10 streamlit run app.py --server.headless true 2>&1 | head -10
